The Discipline of Devotion

The efficacy of an elixir is amplified by the state of the one who consumes it. At Sampriti, we advocate for the ritual over the routine

Longevity is a quiet, cumulative practice—a daily devotion to the self that recognizes the sacredness of the metabolic state. By taking a moment to engage with the aroma, the warmth, and the bitter-sweet complexity of the herbs, you are signaling to your nervous system that it is safe to return to center. This is where the nectar is found: in the deliberate, rhythmic return to one's own essence.

The Intelligence of Ancient Botanicals

Emerging from India's diverse herbal traditions and regional pharmacopoeias, our formulations draw from centuries of botanical wisdom practiced,and perfected across generations. Each blend honours the intelligence of classical herbal alchemy, cultivating vitality and balance through ritual and sustained practice.

Discover The House
The Sampriti Philosophy

Rooted in the Bio-region

The Sanctuary

The Landscape: Located in the sun-drenched, red-earth forests of the Auroville bio-region.

The Architecture: A Spanish-style courtyard designed for the play of light, shadow, and moving air.

The Living Lab: This is our brand’s heartbeat—a private residence and laboratory where ancient botanical formulas meet modern minimalist living.

Our Foundations

Lineage (Parampara): We honour the 4,000-year-old Siddha and Ayurvedic traditions.

Purity (Shuddhi): Wildcrafted botanicals. Vegan formulations. Zero synthetics.

Presence (Dhyana): Every infusion is a ritual, crafted in small batches to preserve the plant’s subtle intelligence.

The Slow Botanical Movement

Conscious Scaling: We prioritize the integrity of the soil over the speed of the market.

The Vessel: We choose glass, cork, and paper. Our goal is to leave no footprint, only a legacy of wellness.

Super Health: Bridging the gap between traditional "Kayakalpa" (rejuvenation) and the global seeker of clarity and joy.

Siddha Wisdom

The Shadow Catalyst: Siddha Wisdom and Dual Black Recovery

Origin I

The House of Sampriti

Total Harmony. Perfect Love. A sanctuary of botanical ritual and disciplined formulation.

Origin II

A Pilgrimage of Wisdom

Sampriti was born from a quiet pilgrimage across India’s living landscapes of plant wisdom—Himalayan ridges, coastal plains, temple gardens, and rain-soaked forests of the South.

I have spent years listening to herbs—not just through texts, but through elders, forests, and my own body. In Siddha philosophy, health is not the absence of illness, but the presence of luminous balance.

Super health is a state where the body becomes a vessel of clarity and joy. To love the body deeply is a spiritual act.

Aishwarya Founder, Sampriti Botanicals
Origin III

Rooted in the Bio-region

The Landscape: Located in the sun-drenched, red-earth forests of the Auroville bio-region.

The Living Lab: This is our brand’s heartbeat—a private residence and laboratory where ancient botanical formulas meet modern minimalist living.
